---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a PR for review
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] DevOps/Infrastructure

## Description
Describe the change and why it's needed.

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue)

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] API tested via Swagger/curl

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] No new lint errors (`ruff check`)
- [ ] No secrets or env vars committed
- [ ] Alembic migration created (if schema change)
- [ ] Updated .env.example (if new env vars)

## Screenshots (if UI change)

## Deployment Notes
Any special steps required for deployment?
